name: a dropped object_entity_ref is recovered from the statement
description: The reported failure: the model emits the spouse edge with object_entity_ref=null and folds the wife into the statement ('I have a wife Celine Hopkins.'), so the property would render its whole sentence instead of the entity name. The deterministic linking net (extraction.link_relationship_objects) recovers the binding from the single non-subject Person mention the statement names — proven here by the materialized inverse on Celine's stream, which only exists when the forward edge resolved its object. Pins docs/ANALYSIS.md 'Entities' object-linking against the model's run-to-run flip.

steps.body: My name is Jeff and I have a wife Celine Hopkins.

facts.statement: I have a wife Celine Hopkins.
